channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Friedrich Merz’s ill-timed tussle with Donald Trump
item.description: The chancellor’s reckless truth-telling means trouble for Germany

item.title: Global carmakers desperately want to be more Chinese
item.description: But partnering with local companies carries big risks

item.title: The remarkable revival of eBay
item.description: The internet’s flea market is back—and GameStop wants to buy it

item.title: Young men are souring on Donald Trump
item.description: But can Democrats win them over?

item.title: How to save the safari
item.description: Balancing the needs of locals, tourists and animals is a difficult business

item.title: The case against trees
item.description: India’s bureaucrats are bad at trade-offs between nature and roads
